name: kfmv4
description: KFM v4 - TypeScript 全栈文件管理器

scripts.check: node check-versions.mjs && sass --no-source-map public/css/:public/css/ && node check-anim.mjs --check-only && node check-as-any.mjs --check-only && node check-registry.mjs --check-only && node check-console.mjs && node check-docs.mjs && node check-linecount.mjs && node check-consistency.mjs && node check-cards.mjs && tsc --noEmit
scripts.build: node check-versions.mjs && node check-anim.mjs && node check-as-any.mjs && node check-registry.mjs && node check-console.mjs && node check-docs.mjs && node check-linecount.mjs && node check-consistency.mjs && tsc --noEmit && node build.mjs
